topic: Australia 2-0 Türkiye, WC 2026 Group D — the dark horses humbled (71.7% possession, Güler's 8 shots) and a 20-year-old ex-refugee, Nestory Irankunda, writes history
subject: nestory-irankunda

thumbnail.concept: Black-and-gold blowout with a bold white 'AUS 2-0 TUR' scoreboard and an 'AGE 20' tag over an erupting-crowd silhouette; the Irankunda subject cutout pinned to one side — tension and a scoreline that screams upset, not two flags.

youtube_title: Irankunda shocks Türkiye: Australia's 2-0 World Cup upset | Güler held scoreless
youtube_description: Australia stunned dark horses Türkiye 2-0 in their World Cup 2026 Group D opener at BC Place, Vancouver. Türkiye had 71.7% possession and Real Madrid's Arda Güler took a tournament-high 8 shots, but keeper Patrick Beach (8 saves on a record debut) and a deep Aussie block held firm. Nestory Irankunda — 20 years old, who came to Australia as a refugee — chased a long ball and finished to become the youngest Australian ever to score at a World Cup (beating Brett Holman by almost six years), before Connor Metcalfe sealed it from range. Australia are now level with the USA atop the same group we covered for the 4-1 Paraguay rout; Türkiye are pointless. Are the Socceroos the real dark horse of Group D now? Your daily World Cup stories, every day. #worldcup2026 #socceroos
instagram_caption: Everyone's dark horse just got humbled. Türkiye had Real Madrid's Güler and 72% of the ball — and a 20-year-old who arrived as a refugee buried them anyway. Australia 2-0 Türkiye, Irankunda into the history books. 🇦🇺 Are the Socceroos the real dark horse of Group D now? Tell me I'm wrong below. Subscribe for your daily World Cup story.
